info.title: Trainer Service
info.description: Trainer CRUD, pipeline, resume, shortlists, slots, TOC, POs, invoices

get.description: Return all distinct primary technology categories.
Return all distinct domains across trainers.
Return all distinct industries from trainer profiles.
Get the status of a bulk categorisation job.

post.description: Trigger bulk AI categorisation for all uncategorised trainers via intelligence-service.
Trigger AI categorisation for a single trainer via intelligence-service.
Frontend-compatible alias: accepts file/files fields and optional ZIPs.
Score and rank trainers against a requirement.

get.description: Return trainers already shortlisted for a requirement.
Return the current pipeline stage for a trainer across all requirements.
Return full email thread for a trainer.

post.description: Send a specific pipeline stage email to a trainer.
Advance a trainer to the next pipeline stage.
Send a resume request email to a trainer.
Apply manual corrections to a parsed resume and mark it confirmed.

get.description: Return domain-wise saved trainers and uploaded resume records.

post.description: Parse availability slots from a trainer's reply text and optionally persist them.

get.description: Return pipeline stage counts across all active shortlists.

post.description: Send the configured mail_type email to one or all trainers on a shortlist.
Email an interview link to a specific trainer.
Forward trainer availability slots to the client via email.

get.description: Return email_logs where an interview is scheduled.

post.description:
Generate a structured TOC for a training programme.
Uses the service-local TOC generator.
Auto-generate a TOC from a requirement_id.
Convert a TOC dict to HTML then PDF via document-service.
Email a TOC to a trainer.
